titleStmt.title: SII 9.529: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 529. (A.R. No. 216 of 1913.) ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE ANJANEYA TEMPLE AT YALPI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1451, Virōdhi, Māgha, śu. 1[1], corresponding to A.D. 1530 January 9, Sunday (not verifiable). It records that Daṇāyakara Timmaras- made a grant of varāhas 36 payable out of the revenue of the village Yaḷape, which was granted to him by Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya, for feeding in the satra 12 Brāmans that may come to the village. The charity was made for the merit of king Achyutarāya-Mahārāya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayā
bhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣaṁgaḷu
1451 yane virōdhisaṁvatsarada māgha śu 11
lu śrīmatu daṇāyakara tiṁmarasaru māḍida sa
trada dharmaśāsana . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa kruṣṇarāyamahārāyaru
namage mukhāse kudurege pālisida yaḷapeya grāma
dalu baṁdaṁthā brā(ṁ)hmarige dinavoṁdakkaṁ haṁnneraḍu maṁ
di brā(ṁ)hmarige A(ṁ)nnadāna tiṁgaḷu voṁdakke ghaṭṭivaraha
ga 3 ra lekhadalu varuṣa 1 kaṁ ghaṭṭivaraha ga 36 mū
vattāru varaha lekhadalu yaḷapegrāmada kaṁdāya
da kaṭṭina rokadoḷage Acyutarāyamahārāyarige
dharmavāgabēkeṁdu mūvattāru varahagaḷu dhāreyane
radu koṭṭau �yo A(ṁ)nnasatrada dharmavu Ācaṁ
drārkasthāyiyāgi �yo dharmmasatra sīmege
Āva dhore baṁdareU sūryyacaṁdraru yaṁtara
lu naḍasuvaru naḍasade tapidare taṁma tāyi taṁdegaḷanu vā
raṇāsiyalu koṁda pāpake hōharu gōvadheya māḍida
pāpakke hōharu guṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ parada
ttānupālanaṁ pa hārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphala
ṁ bhavēt [.] dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnu
pālanaṁ dānātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyu
taṁ padaṁ . yēkaikabhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhu
ja na bhōjya na karagrāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā .
kaṁca ciṁnōja .
Digital edition of SII 9.529 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
